<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream << packet_id;
        stream << hexi::uint32(static_cast<uint32_t>(username.size())) << username;
        stream << hexi::uint32(static_cast<uint32_t>(scores.size())) << scores;
        stream << hexi::null_terminated(metadata);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::memory_buffer buffer;
    hexi::stream stream(buffer);
    packet.serialise(stream);
    
    const auto* data = buffer.data();
    size_t size = buffer.size();
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(data, data + size);
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <stdexcept>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    size_t offset = 0;

    // Read packet_id
    uint32_t packet_id = hexi::read<uint32_t>(buffer.data() + offset, buffer.size() - offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);

    // Read username length
    uint32_t username_length = hexi::read<uint32_t>(buffer.data() + offset, buffer.size() - offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);

    // Check if buffer has enough data for username
    if (offset + username_length > buffer.size()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Buffer too small for username");
    }

    // Read username
    std::string username(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(buffer.data() + offset), username_length);
    offset += username_length;

    // Read score count
    uint32_t score_count = hexi::read<uint32_t>(buffer.data() + offset, buffer.size() - offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);

    // Check if buffer has enough data for scores
    if (offset + score_count * sizeof(uint32_t) > buffer.size()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Buffer too small for scores");
    }

    // Read scores
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores(score_count);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < score_count; ++i) {
        scores[i] = hexi::read<uint32_t>(buffer.data() + offset, buffer.size() - offset);
        offset += sizeof(uint32_t);
    }

    // Read metadata (null-terminated)
    const uint8_t* metadata_start = buffer.data() + offset;
    const uint8_t* current = metadata_start;
    while (current < buffer.data() + buffer.size() && *current != 0) {
        ++current;
    }

    if (current == buffer.data() + buffer.size()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Metadata null terminator not found");
    }

    uint32_t metadata_length = current - metadata_start;
    std::string metadata(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(metadata_start), metadata_length);
    offset += metadata_length + 1; // +1 for null terminator

    // Skip any remaining padding bytes
    if (offset < buffer.size()) {
        // Remaining bytes are padding and are ignored
    }

    return {packet_id, username, scores, metadata};
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    size_t offset = 0;

    // Read packet_id
    uint32_t packet_id = hexi::read<uint32_t>(buffer.data() + offset, buffer.size() - offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);

    // Read username length
    uint32_t username_length = hexi::read<uint32_t>(buffer.data() + offset, buffer.size() - offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);

    // Check if buffer has enough data for username
    if (offset + username_length > buffer.size()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Buffer too small for username");
    }

    // Create string_view for username (zero-copy)
    std::string_view username(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(buffer.data() + offset), username_length);
    offset += username_length;

    // Read score count
    uint32_t score_count = hexi::read<uint32_t>(buffer.data() + offset, buffer.size() - offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);

    // Skip scores without reading them
    size_t scores_size = score_count * sizeof(uint32_t);
    if (offset + scores_size > buffer.size()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Buffer too small for scores");
    }
    offset += scores_size;

    return {packet_id, username};
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
    uint32_t footer;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    MessageHeader header;
    
    // Read message_type (2 bytes)
    header.message_type = hexi::read_uint16(buffer.data(), 2);
    
    // Read body_length (4 bytes) starting at offset 2
    header.body_length = hexi::read_uint32(buffer.data() + 2, 4);
    
    // Skip the body data (body_length bytes) starting at offset 6
    hexi::skip(buffer.data() + 6, header.body_length);
    
    // Read footer (4 bytes) starting at offset 6 + body_length
    header.footer = hexi::read_uint32(buffer.data() + 6 + header.body_length, 4);
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint8_t version;
    uint8_t flags;
    uint16_t packet_id;
};

PacketHeader read_packet_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    return *reinterpret_cast<const PacketHeader*>(buffer.data());
}

std::string_view read_message_until_delimiter(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    const uint8_t* data = buffer.data();
    size_t len = buffer.size();
    
    for (size_t i = 0; i < len; ++i) {
        if (data[i] == 0) {
            return std::string_view(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data), i);
        }
    }
    return std::string_view(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data), len);
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <stdexcept>

std::vector<uint32_t> read_item_batch(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Check if the buffer is large enough to read the item count
    if (buffer.size() < sizeof(uint32_t)) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Buffer too small to read item count");
    }
    
    // Read the item count from the first 4 bytes
    uint32_t item_count;
    hexi::read(&item_count, buffer.data(), sizeof(uint32_t));
    
    // Calculate the required buffer size for all items
    size_t required_size = sizeof(uint32_t) + item_count * sizeof(uint32_t);
    if (buffer.size() < required_size) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Buffer too small to read all items");
    }
    
    // Create a vector to hold the items
    std::vector<uint32_t> items(item_count);
    
    // Read the items using hexi::read_container
    hexi::read_container(items.data(), item_count, buffer.data() + sizeof(uint32_t), sizeof(uint32_t));
    
    return items;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>

    uint32_t user_id;

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator<uint8_t> allocator;

    // Serialize the UserData using the stream
    data.serialise(stream);
    
    // Return the buffer containing the serialized data
    return adaptor.get_buffer();
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstring>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    // Write the header as 4 bytes
    buffer.write(reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&header), sizeof(header));
    // Write the data vector
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<1024>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<> result;
    
    // Read the header (first 4 bytes)
    const uint8_t* buffer_data = buffer.data();
    std::memcpy(&result.header, buffer_data, sizeof(result.header));
    
    // Read the data array of specified length
    result.data.assign(buffer_data + sizeof(result.header), 
                      buffer_data + sizeof(result.header) + data_length);
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
hexi::dynamic_tls_buffer<block_size, allocator_count> create_tls_buffer() {

}

#include <hexi/allocators/tls_block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
using tls_allocator_type = hexi::tls_block_allocator<hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>, allocator_count>;

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
void enter_thread_with_allocator(tls_allocator_type<block_size, allocator_count>& allocator) {
    // Initialize the TLS allocator for the current thread
    allocator.initialize_thread();
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
void exit_thread_with_allocator(tls_allocator_type<block_size, allocator_count>& allocator) {
    // Clean up the TLS allocator for the current thread
    allocator.cleanup_thread();
}
```</answer>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    size_t total_readable = storage.get_write_offset() - storage.get_read_offset();
    size_t bytes_to_copy = std::min(bytes_to_preview, total_readable);
    
    if (bytes_to_copy == 0) return result;
    
    size_t remaining = bytes_to_copy;
    auto block = storage.get_current_read_block();
    const uint8_t* current_read_ptr = storage.get_read_ptr();
    size_t current_read_offset = storage.get_read_offset();
    
    while (remaining > 0 && block != nullptr) {
        size_t block_size_actual = block->get_size();
        size_t available_in_block = block_size_actual - current_read_offset;
        size_t copy_this_iteration = std::min(available_in_block, remaining);
        
        result.insert(result.end(), current_read_ptr, current_read_ptr + copy_this_iteration);
        remaining -= copy_this_iteration;
        current_read_ptr += copy_this_iteration;
        current_read_offset += copy_this_iteration;
        
        if (current_read_offset >= block_size_actual) {
            block = block->get_next();
            if (block != nullptr) {
                current_read_ptr = block->get_data();
                current_read_offset = 0;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
BufferStatus<block_size> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    BufferStatus<block_size> status;
    status.readable_size = storage.get_write_offset() - storage.get_read_offset();
    status.free_space = block_size - (storage.get_write_offset() % block_size);
    return status;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.clear();
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>
#include <stdexcept>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::file_buffer fb;
    if (!fb.open(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::READ)) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file for reading");
    }
    
    std::unique_ptr<uint8_t[]> buffer(new uint8_t[bytes_to_read]);
    size_t bytes_read = fb.read(buffer.get(), bytes_to_read);
    
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(buffer.get(), buffer.get() + bytes_read);
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    hexi::file_buffer fb;
    if (!fb.open(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::READ)) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file for previewing");
    }
    
    auto original_pos = fb.tell();
    std::unique_ptr<uint8_t[]> buffer(new uint8_t[bytes_to_preview]);
    size_t bytes_read = fb.read(buffer.get(), bytes_to_preview);
    fb.seek(original_pos);
    
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(buffer.get(), buffer.get() + bytes_read);
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer fb;
    if (!fb.open(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::WRITE)) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file for writing");
    }
    
    if (!data.empty()) {
        fb.write(data.data(), data.size());
        fb.flush();
    }
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer fb;
    if (!fb.open(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::READ)) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file for size checking");
    }
    
    fb.seek(hexi::file_buffer::SEEK_END);
    size_t size = fb.tell();
    fb.seek(hexi::file_buffer::SEEK_SET);
    
    return size;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size() && i < buffer_size; ++i) {
        buffer[i] = static_cast<std::byte>(data[i]);
    }
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    size_t bytes_to_copy = std::min(bytes_to_read, buffer_size);
    result.resize(bytes_to_copy);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < bytes_to_copy; ++i) {
        result[i] = static_cast<uint8_t>(buffer[i]);
    }
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
struct BufferInfo {
    size_t capacity;
    size_t current_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo<> get_buffer_info(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, 1024>& buffer) {

    info.capacity = 1024;
    info.current_size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = info.capacity - info.current_size;
    return info;
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>

size_t get_stream_size(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.buffer_size();
}

bool is_stream_empty(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.buffer_size() == 0;
}

struct StreamInfo {
    hexi::stream_state state;
    size_t buffer_size;
    bool is_empty;
};

StreamInfo get_stream_state_info(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    StreamInfo info;
    info.state = stream.state();
    info.buffer_size = stream.buffer_size();
    info.is_empty = (info.buffer_size == 0);
    return info;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

void write_string_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::string& str) {
    writer.write_uint32(static_cast<uint32_t>(str.length()));
    writer.write_bytes(str.data(), str.length());
}

std::string read_string_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    uint32_t length = reader.read_uint32();

    return result;
}

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void write_container_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::vector<uint32_t>& container) {
    // Write the count of elements first
    writer.write_uint32(static_cast<uint32_t>(container.size()));

    for (uint32_t value : container) {
        writer.write_uint32(value);
    }
}

std::vector<uint32_t> read_container_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    // Read the count of elements first
    uint32_t count = reader.read_uint32();
    std::vector<uint32_t> container;
    // Pre-allocate memory for efficiency
    container.reserve(count);
    // Read each element based on the count
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
        container.push_back(reader.read_uint32());
    }
    return container;
}

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstring>

void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t value, const void* data, std::size_t length) {
    // Write the integer value
    std::byte temp[4];
    std::memcpy(temp, &value, sizeof(value));
    buffer.write(temp, sizeof(temp));
    
    // Write the byte array
    if (data != nullptr && length > 0) {
        const std::byte* byte_data = static_cast<const std::byte*>(data);
        buffer.write(byte_data, length);
    }
}

void read_data_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t& value, void* data, std::size_t length) {
    // Read the integer value
    std::byte temp[4];
    buffer.read(temp, sizeof(temp));
    std::memcpy(&value, temp, sizeof(value));
    
    // Read the byte array
    if (data != nullptr && length > 0) {
        std::byte* byte_data = static_cast<std::byte*>(data);
        buffer.read(byte_data, length);
    }
}

struct BufferInfo {
    std::size_t size;
    std::size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo get_buffer_info(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    BufferInfo info;
    info.size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = buffer.capacity() - info.size;
    return info;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::size_t find_byte_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    const auto* data = buffer.data();
    std::size_t size = buffer.size();
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
        if (data[i] == value) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

std::size_t find_delimiter_position(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte delimiter) {
    const auto* data = buffer.data();
    std::size_t size = buffer.size();
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
        if (data[i] == delimiter) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

bool check_buffer_contains(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    return find_byte_in_buffer(buffer, value) != hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string result;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(result);
    return result;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    const char* src_start = static_cast<const char*>(src);
    const char* src_end = src_start + src_len;
    const char* dst_start = static_cast<const char*>(dst);
    const char* dst_end = dst_start + dst_len;
    
    return (src_start < dst_end) && (dst_start < src_end);
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        return false;
    }
    std::memcpy(destination, source, length);
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    ExceptionDetails details;
    details.read_size = e.read_size();
    details.total_read = e.total_read();
    details.limit_or_size = e.buff_size();
    details.message = e.what();
    return details;
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    ExceptionDetails details;
    details.read_size = e.read_size();
    details.total_read = e.total_read();
    details.limit_or_size = e.read_limit();
    details.message = e.what();
    return details;
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return std::string(e.what());
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator allocator;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::stream stream(allocator, adaptor);

    // Write header
    stream.write(packet.header);
    
    // Write data length as uint32_t
    uint32_t data_length = static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data.size());
    stream.write(data_length);
    
    // Write data string
    stream.write(packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());
    
    // Write 16 bytes of padding (0x00)
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);
    
    // Write footer
    stream.write(packet.footer);

    return buffer;

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator allocator;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::stream stream(allocator, adaptor);

    // Write header
    stream.write(packet.header);
    
    // Write data length as uint32_t
    uint32_t data_length = static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data.size());
    stream.write(data_length);
    
    // Write data string
    stream.write(packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());
    
    // Write 16 bytes of padding (0x00)
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);
    
    // Write footer
    stream.write(packet.footer);

    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    std::size_t size() const override {
        return data_.size();
    }
    
    bool empty() const override {
        return data_.empty();
    }
    
    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::size_t write_multiple_chunks(const std::vector<std::vector<uint8_t>>& chunks) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_sequence buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    
    for (const auto& chunk : chunks) {
        // Check available space before writing
        std::size_t available = adaptor.free();
        if (chunk.size() > available) {
            // If chunk is larger than available space, resize buffer to accommodate
            buffer.resize(buffer.size() + chunk.size() - available);
        }
        adaptor.write(chunk.data(), chunk.size());
    }
    
    return buffer.size();
}

std::vector<uint8_t> read_partial_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, std::size_t chunk_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    std::vector<uint8_t> chunk(chunk_size);
    
    while (adaptor.size() > 0) {
        std::size_t bytes_read = adaptor.read(chunk.data(), chunk_size);
        result.insert(result.end(), chunk.begin(), chunk.begin() + bytes_read);
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    
    // Serialize message_id with big-endian conversion
    stream.write(hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id));
    
    // Serialize data_values with element-wise big-endian conversion
    stream.write_container(packet.data_values, [](const uint16_t& val) {
        return hexi::endian::native_to_big(val);
    });
    
    // Serialize checksum with big-endian conversion
    stream.write(hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum));
    
    return buffer.data();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    
    // Deserialize message_id and convert to native
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(stream.read<uint32_t>());
    
    // Deserialize data_values count and elements
    uint32_t count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(stream.read<uint32_t>());
    packet.data_values.resize(count);
    stream.read_container(packet.data_values);
    
    // Convert each data value from big-endian to native
    for (auto& val : packet.data_values) {
        val = hexi::endian::big_to_native(val);
    }
    
    // Deserialize checksum and convert to native
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(stream.read<uint32_t>());
    
    return packet;
}

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    ProtocolHeader header;
    
    // Extract message_id using span for zero-copy access
    auto msg_id_span = stream.span<uint32_t>();
    header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(*msg_id_span);
    
    // Skip the message_id bytes to position stream correctly
    stream.skip(sizeof(uint32_t));
    
    return header;
}
